name: Citicoline
summary: Citicoline (CDP-choline) supplies choline and cytidine-derived precursors used in phosphatidylcholine metabolism. Small randomized trials in selected older adults suggest possible short-term improvements in memory, including a 12-week study using 500 mg/day, but the broader evidence is heterogeneous and does not establish a large or universal cognitive-enhancing effect.
description: Citicoline (CDP-choline) supplies choline and cytidine-derived precursors used in phosphatidylcholine metabolism. Small randomized trials in selected older adults suggest possible short-term improvements in memory, including a 12-week study using 500 mg/day, but the broader evidence is heterogeneous and does not establish a large or universal cognitive-enhancing effect.
safety: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.8: Citicoline has RCT evidence for memory in older adults; avoid claiming broad stimulant-like focus benefits.
claimMap.notes: v9.8: Citicoline has RCT evidence for memory in older adults; avoid claiming broad stimulant-like focus benefits.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 500 mg/day citicoline for 12 weeks in healthy older adults with age-associated memory impairment

claimMap.claim: v9.2: 500 mg/day improved episodic and composite memory in a 12-week RCT of healthy older adults with age-associated memory impairment.
claimMap.notes: v9.2: 500 mg/day improved episodic and composite memory in a 12-week RCT of healthy older adults with age-associated memory impairment.
